name: Passbolt (MariaDB)
tagline: Passbolt is a free and open source password manager that allows team members to store and share credentials securely. Enter your Passbolt configuration parame
description:
Passbolt is a free and open source password manager that allows team members to store and share credentials securely. Enter your Passbolt configuration parame


_Template derived from caprover/one-click-apps (caprover@bd357c9, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  passbolt-db:
    image: mariadb:10.1
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: rootpassword
      MYSQL_DATABASE: passbolt_oca
      MYSQL_USER: passbolt
      MYSQL_PASSWORD: password
    volumes:
      - passbolt-db:/var/lib/mysql
    ports:
      - 42093:80
  passbolt-pb:
    image: passbolt/passbolt:3.9.0-2
    restart: unless-stopped
    depends_on:
      - passbolt-db
    environment:
      DATASOURCES_DEFAULT_HOST: passbolt-db:3306
      DATASOURCES_DEFAULT_DATABASE: passbolt_oca
      DATASOURCES_DEFAULT_USERNAME: passbolt
      DATASOURCES_DEFAULT_PASSWORD: password
      APP_FULL_BASE_URL: https://yourdomain.com
      EMAIL_TRANSPORT_DEFAULT_HOST: smtp.gmail.com
      EMAIL_TRANSPORT_DEFAULT_PORT: 587
      EMAIL_TRANSPORT_DEFAULT_USERNAME: user@gmail.com
      EMAIL_DEFAULT_FROM: user@gmail.com
      EMAIL_TRANSPORT_DEFAULT_PASSWORD: password
      EMAIL_TRANSPORT_DEFAULT_TLS: true
    volumes:
      - passbolt-gpg:/etc/passbolt/gpg
      - passbolt-jwt:/etc/passbolt/jwt
      - passbolt-images:/usr/share/php/passbolt/webroot/img/public/images
volumes:
  passbolt-db: null
  passbolt-gpg: null
  passbolt-jwt: null
  passbolt-images: null
